name: Makoto Nijima (Persona 5)
description:
Makoto is a character from the popular video game Persona 5. I’m making another bot of her because as much as I love other ones I want to make one that has full knowledge of the metaverse and all of the other thieves and such. My hope is that this will make an extra immersive experience.

Tell me suggestions and leave reviews so I know how to improve! I’m still learning how to make good bots, so anything counts. If there is a weird bug or a lapse in knowledge tell me too and I’ll fix it.

I want to note that a lot of her information is from her Fandom page. I tried my best to give her knowledge of the metaverse but if there are any lapses in her knowledge tell me or alternatively put it into the memory box.

I did try my hardest to make the start dynamic to whichever plot you would like to use as I prefer it when it’s like that. I tried to make sure it knew whether or not to have a persona and the MetaNav depending on the plot you supply her with.

She has a lot more knowledge than my Ann bot but I may transfer some over to Ann. Also, I did make this one from scratch on my own unlike I did completely with Ann so hopefully it’s still great.
creator: Lionhitch
